title: $1 Ride
description:
$1 Ride is a casual game with a fast paced, timing and reflex testing game-play style. 
Travel through space at warp speed! Collect power ups to increase your speed or risk your fuel to collect money, missiles and more.$1 Ride Features• - Collect power ups and loot as you fly through space. 

• - Do battle with your friends on the leaderboards. 

• - Unlock new ships. 

• - A fantastic soundtrack by Eric Matyas.
description_short: $1 Ride is a casual game with a fast paced, timing and reflex testing game-play style. Travel through space at warp speed! Collect power ups to increase your speed or risk your fuel to collect money, missiles and more.
